sections.sectionTitle: Jew Mite in A Galte uh Susia

verses.text: A kha sawmlenihna ahi Adar kha a ni sawmlethum ni-in kumpipa' thupiakna bangin sepkhiatna ding hun hong tung hi. Jew mite' galte in gualzo dinga a ki-up ni teek pen amau a mudah mite' tungah Jew mite a gualzawh ni ding hong hizaw hi

Tua ni-in amaute' siatna ding a geelte a sugawp dingin Kumpipa Ahasueras' ukna gam khempeuha amau' khuapite sungah Jew mite kikhawm uh hi. Mi khempeuh in Jew mite kihta uh ahih manin kuamah in Jew mite nang ngamlo uh hi
Mordekai kihta uh ahih manin gam tampi a ukte leh gam khat a ukte leh gamsunga ulian tuamtuamte leh kumpi ulian khempeuh in Jew mite pan'pih uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh kumpi inn sungah Mordekai ulianpi khat suak a, a vangliatna a khan' semsem mah bangin gam khempeuhah ama minthan'na kizel hi
Tua ahih ciangin Jew mite in namsau tawh a galte uh tampi tak thatlum uh a, amau a mudahte a ut utun hihgawp uh hi
Kumpi khua Susa khuapi sung mahmahah Jew mite in mi za nga thatin susia uh hi

Tua hi a, amaute in Jew mite' gal ahi Hammedatha' tapa Haman' tapa sawmte Parshandatha, Dalfon, Aspatha, Poratha, Adalia, Aridatha, Parmashta, Arisai, Aridai, leh Vaizatha-te zong a that uh hi. Ahi zongin amau' neihsate suksaklo uh hi
Kumpi khua Susa khuapi sunga a kithat zah tua ni mahmahin kumpipa kiangah kizasak hi

Tua ciangin kumpipa in Kumpinu Esther kiangah, “Kumpi khua Susa khuapi sungah Jew mite in mi za nga that uh a, Haman' tapa sawmte zong that uh hi. Ka ukna gamdangte sungah zong bangzah that ding kitheilo hi. Tu-in bang deih lai na hi hiam? Nong nget peuhpeuh hong kipia lai ding hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Esther in, “Kumpipa in hoih na sak leh, tuni-a mah bangin zing ciangin zong Susa khuapi sunga om Jew mite tungah hih theihna thu pia in la, Haman' tapa sawmte' luanghawmte khuam tungah khaisak in,” a ci hi
Tua ahih manin tua banga a hihna dingin kumpipa in a sawl hi. Susa khuapi sungah hih thu suakkhiasak a, khuam tungah Haman' tapa sawmte kikhai hi
Susa khuapi sunga om Jew mite Adar kha a ni sawmleli ni-in kikhawm kikin Susa khua sungah mi za thum that uh hi. Ahi zongin amau' neihsate suksaklo uh hi.

Tua mah bangin kumpipa' ukna gam tuamtuama om Jew mite zong amau' kihutna dingin kikhawm uh hi. Amaute in zong amau a mudah mihing tul sawmsagih leh tul nga thatin a galte uh tungah phu la uh hi. Ahih hangin a neihsate uh suksaklo uh hi
Hih banga a hih pen Adar kha a ni sawmlethum ni hi a, a ni sawmleli ni-in tawlnga uh a, pawi bawlin lungdamin om uh hi
Ahih hangin Susa khua sunga om Jew mite ahih leh a ni sawmlethum leh sawmleli ni-in kikaikhawm uh a, a ni sawmlenga ni tawlnga uh a, pawi bawlin lungdamin om uh hi
Hih thu hangin gamsung khuaneute-a teng Jew mite in Adar kha a ni sawmleli ni pawi bawlna leh lungdam ni dingin tawlngak ni-in nei uh a, anlimnono kikholhna ni-in a zang uh hi
Tua ciangin Mordekai in hih thupiangte khempeuh lai-in ciamteh a, a nai a gamla-a om Kumpi Ahasueras' ukna gamsung khempeuha om Jew mite tungah lai paisak hi
A kumkumin Adar kha ni sawmleli ni leh sawmlenga ni a tan'na dingun thu a pia hi

Tua nite pen Jew mite a galte uh tung panin a suahtak ni, dahna leh thumnate lungdamna leh lungnopna a suah kha ahi hi. Tua ahih manin amaute in pawi bawl ni leh lungdam ni-in nei-in, anlimnono khatlekhat kikholh ni leh mizawngte tungah letsong piak ni-in a zat dingun thu a pia hi
Tua ahih ciangin Mordekai' laigelh-na tawh kizui-in Jew mite in a patsa uh hih banga a hihnate uh a zom uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Jew mi khempeuh' gal ahi, Hammedatha' tapa, Agag-te beh Haman in Jew mite sugawpin a suksiatna dingin Pur kici ai sanin Jew mite suksiat ding sawm hi

Ahih hangin kumpipa in hih thu a theih ciangin, Jew mite sukna dingin Haman in a geelsa thu hoihlo pen Haman' lu tung mah a lehtukna ding, leh amah leh a tapate khuam tungah a kikhaina ding lai-in gelhin thu a pia hi

Tua ahih ciangin Pur min tamin hih hun sung teng Purim ci-in min a phuak uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin hih lai sunga a kigelh thute khempeuh, leh hih thute amau' mit tawh mu-in a pumpi uh tawh a tuahna uh hangin
Jew mite amau mahmah, leh a suan a khakte uh, leh amau a pawlpih khempeuh in lai sunga kigelh bangin a kiseh hunin kum simin hih ni nihte a pelloin a tan' ding uh kipsak uh a

a khangkhangin innkuan sim, gam sim, khuapi simah hih nite phawkin a kitan'na ding, leh Jew mite lakah hih Purim nite a kitan' ngitngetna ding ahi a, a suanlekhakte un zong hih thu a mangngilh hetlohna ding uh ahi zongin khotakin a len uh hi
Tua ciangin Abihail' tanu Kumpinu Esther in Purim thu tawh kisai hih laikhak nihna a kipsakna dingin Jew mi Mordekai tungah aana a kicingin a piakna lai-in a gelh hi
Kumpi Ahasueras' ukna gam za leh sawmnihsagih sungah a om Jew mite khempeuh tungah kilemna leh nopna a omna ding deihsakna laite kikhak a

Jew mi Mordekai in a gelhsa bangin a kisehsa tawh kizui-in hih Purim nite a tan'na dingun thu kipia hi. Tua mah bangin amaute leh a suanlekhakte uh-a' dingin antan'na ding leh thumna bawlna ding ngeinate a gelh uh hi
Kumpinu Esther' thupiakna in hih Purim bawlna ding ngeinate kipsak a, lai thupite sungah hih thu kiciamteh hi.
